text: In today's video, I'll tell you about heading and paragraphs along with that, I'll also tell you about anchor text If you found this course awesome, then do like this video Your likes will help me in getting such free courses In this video, we'll make a small project which will be a bookmark website This bookmark website will help you in getting all your favorite websites together and you'll be able to use it in actual So let's start quickly Write in the comments below, sigma batch op Let's roll the intro Intro music So guys, as you can see, I'm in my computer screen and if you haven't accessed the playlist yet, then you can do so One more thing I want to tell you is that if you go to github.com or repository then you'll get a GitHub repo of sigma web dev course I've made a folder for all the videos and I've made a commit according to the folder So do access this folder so that you can get the source code I'll also put the source code in the description so there's no problem Now we'll make a very basic website but it'll be very important for us because it'll be our first useful website So without taking too much time I'll make a new folder in this sigma web dev folder and I'll name it video4 because it's our fourth video So I'll make it with the name video4 by clicking on shift right and open with code so that the folder opens in our VS code After doing this, I'll do what we always do index.html, main.css, style.css and along with that, script.js We usually make these 3 files If I write css, I'll put it here If I write script, I'll put it here but for now, I'll just write an exclamation mark here and write something like this in the document my bookmarks So we're going to make a bookmark website and I'll write code with that here So you must have seen such titles Now I'll write h1 here Now what happens with h1? You can add headings to your web page with h1 We talked about the basic structure We said that this is an HTML page html lang is equal to en lang is an attribute and its value is en which means that the content of this page is in English
